channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Hollow Knight Silksong Physical Edition Details Surface
item.content:encoded:
A new report has provided players with the release date, price, and contents of the Hollow Knight Silksong physical edition.

Earlier this year, outlets claimed that the highly revered title would receive a physical release in 2026. We have yet to receive an official announcement from the developers, Team Cherry, and based on the information in the latest report, it seems this version of the game will take a bit more time but will arrive in 2026. Learn about everything that has surfaced about the physical edition for Silksong below:

Hollow Knight Silksong Physical Edition Release Date Set for October 16, 2026

Through the latest report from billbil-kun on Dealabs, details about the physical edition of Hollow Knight: Silksong have been revealed, including the release date and price. The physical edition is set for release in the United States on October 16, 2026. It will be available for Switch 2, which is also compatible with the original Switch, along with PS5, Xbox Series X, and Xbox One versions.

In terms of pricing, the Switch 2 version of the game will cost $44.99, while the PS5, Xbox Series X, and Xbox One versions will be available for $39.99. The Switch 2 version will come with the full game on cartridge, featuring an upgrade specifically for the Switch 2. Additionally, fans will receive a 32-page manual and a fold-out map of Pharloom. The physical edition is being distributed by Fangamer, who also handled distribution for the previous title.

The report indicates that Hollow Knight: Silksong will receive a physical re-release for the Switch 2 and PS5 in the United States. This version is compatible with the Switch and will be available on October 16, 2026, priced at $34.99 for both platforms. The physical copy will include a game cartridge or disc, a 28-page manual, and a fold-out map of Hollownest. The date for the official announcement and details regarding Europe have not yet been revealed.

In other news, Hollow Knight: Silksong was voted as the Insider Gaming Community’s 2025 Indie Game of the Year. Additionally, here is the release period information for the Sea of Sorrows DLC. What are your thoughts on the physical edition details for Hollow Knight Silksong? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about Mina the Hollower becoming a contender for indie GOTY in 2026. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

item.title: Today’s Contexto: Hints & Answer For May 28, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Contexto is a word association game that gives you a new word to guess every single day. With every attempt, the AI algorithm determines how close your guess is to the daily answer based on thematic and contextual similarity.

Sometimes, though, no matter how experienced you are, the word you’re looking for can be incredibly vague and hard to deduce. Luckily for you, this guide is full of hints to give you a helping hand, but make sure you give today’s Contexto a go if you haven’t already!

How To Play Contexto

Contexto is incredibly simple to play, but difficult to master. All you have to do is type words into the search bar, and the AI algorithm will tell you how close your word is to the answer.

You’ll know how close your guess is based on the colour of the bar and the number next to it.

  • Red includes guesses with the number 1,501 and above, meaning you’re way off from the secret word.
  • Orange includes guesses between 301 and 1,500, meaning you’re getting closer, but still some ways off.
  • Green includes guesses between 1 and 300, meaning you’re on the right track.

Best Contexto Tips & Tricks

  • Start off using broad terms, then narrow down once you’ve got under the 1,000 mark.
  • Try using Nouns first, and dip into verbs or adjectives once you’ve discovered the context.
  • Experiment with random words at times, especially as different forms of a root word can rank differently, such as work and worker.
  • Guess away, as unlike other word games like Wordle, you aren’t limited to a strict number of attempts.

Best Starting Words For Contexto

Here are some great starting words to get you going with Contexto:

  • Thing
  • Person
  • Place
  • Animal
  • Work
  • Nature
  • Game
  • Concept
  • Idea
  • Food

Contexto Hints For Today, May 28, 2026

Without giving away today’s Contexto answer, here are a few helpful hints to get you thinking in the right direction:

  • Hint 1: Double
  • Hint 2: Two of the same
  • Hint 3: Often identical

If they don’t help, then here are the nine closest words, going from tenth to second:

  • Friend
  • Father
  • Mother
  • Daughter
  • Cousin
  • Sister
  • Brother
  • Sibling
  • Triplet

Today’s Contexto Answer For May 28, 2026

If you’ve tried everything and still can’t figure out today’s Contexto answer, then you can find it down below:

Answer: Twin

A Twin is often used to describe two similar things, or to pair something with something else incredibly alike.

When Is The Next Contexto Game?

Contexto is updated daily at 12 AM or Midnight in your respective time zone, meaning the next game will start on May 29.

The Contexto schedule is very consistent, with a new game releasing at the same time every day.

How did you find today’s Contexto? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/todays-contexto-hints-answer-for-may-28-2026/

item.title: When Will Fortnite Servers Be Back Up? Fortnite May 28 Downtime, Explained
item.content:encoded:
The final update of Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2 lands today, with Epic Games preparing for the launch of a new season in a few weeks, resulting in the servers being unavailable.

Epic Games has settled into a regular schedule of updates in Fortnite, with a new patch every two weeks, and following the last update on May 14, a fresh period of downtime is taking place.

If you’re keen to know when the Fortnite servers will be available again, Insider Gaming has all the important details.

When Will Fortnite Servers Be Back Up?

Fortnite servers are down for several hours for the May 28 update, although the exact time they will return has not been confirmed by Epic Games.

Downtime is expected to commence at 4 AM ET, the standard time for periods of server unavailability to begin in Fortnite, and while the exact length of time the servers will be unavailable hasn’t been confirmed, previous experience provides an expected time frame.

Mid-season updates don’t tend to have the same lengthy downtime as seasonal transitions, unless the patch is bigger than usual or any problems arise, so the May 28 downtime is expected to last for around three to four hours.

As such, expect the Fortnite servers to be available again from around 7 AM/8 AM ET, though the best approach, as always, is to keep tabs on social media for the latest downtime updates.

What’s in The Fortnite May 28 Update?

The May 28 update in Fortnite is the final one of Chapter 7 Season 2, and could therefore provide the first leaks of what to expect when Chapter 7, Season 3 kicks off next month.

A live event for the end of the season has already been confirmed, which is set to be put in place in this update, so details on what players can expect from that are likely to surface. Additionally, more rewards distributed in the Fortnite Community Day this weekend could emerge.

New content is also on the horizon with the Epilogue period of Showdown, the main story that has been playing out this season, and while it doesn’t kick off immediately, the patch will reveal what to expect.

Finally, expect the same updates as usual to the Item Shop, revealing when fan-favorite skins will be making their return, and highlighting any future collabs that could be on the cards.

What do you want to see in this Fortnite update? Share your thoughts in the Insider Gaming Discord.

Don’t forget to tune into the Insider Gaming Showcase on May 28, featuring 55 total games, including 12 World Premieres.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: NYT Strands #816 Hints and Answers for Today, May 28, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Strands is a daily word search puzzle game from The New York Times. It is a relatively new game, launched in 2024, in which players seek a common theme among words in a 6×8 letter grid.

Whether it’s your first time playing or you’re a Strands veteran, today’s tips and strategies can help you find words faster. So, if you’ve found yourself stuck with today’s Strands, don’t worry, below you’ll find some helpful hints and even the answers for Strands Game #816 for Thursday, May 28, 2026

To play today’s Strands, head to the game’s website.

IMPORTANT: The following information includes spoilers on today’s edition of Strands. If you don’t want the answer given to you, stop scrolling.

How To Play Strands

Strands is a daily word search that challenges you to find words with a common theme. There’s also a Spanagram that reveals the deeper theme behind the words.

  • Words that are three letters or fewer do not count.
  • Words that reveal the correct theme appear in blue.
  • The Spanagram turns yellow when found.
  • Finding three words that don’t fit the theme will reveal a hint to help you find the proper words.

The goal is to string together as many words as possible. Every letter on the grid gets used! Daily puzzles keep players coming back for more, making it a fun brain exercise and a popular online trend.

Strands can only be played on the New York Times website or on the NYT Games app.

Strands Hints For Today, May 28, 2026

The Strands’ answers to the theme of Game #816 are all terms related to fragrances.

General Strands Hints For May 28

Without giving today’s Strands answers completely away, here are a few helpful hints for today to get you started:

  • Hint 1: Elon.
  • Hint 2: The princess in Aladdin.
  • Hint 3: French Butter.

Use these clues to narrow down your searches and increase your chances of solving Strands #816 for May 28, 2026.

Words to Help You Find Strand Hints for May 27, 2026

If you want help getting started without having today’s Strands answer given to you, there are a few starter words worth trying that will help you unlock some in-game hints. A few starter words that may help are:

  • FORT
  • MINK
  • PEAS
  • GRAN
  • SUGAR

Today’s Strands Answer For Game #816 On May 28, 2026

If you’ve tried everything, including using the above hints, and are still stuck, you can find the answers to today’s Strands below. Check out the answers for past puzzles here.

  • SANDALWOOD
  • PEAR
  • BERGAMOT
  • NEROLI
  • JASMIN
  • MUSK
  • SPANAGRAM: FRAGRANCE

If you solved today’s Strands without our answers, congratulations! If not, take note of the best tips above for tomorrow’s puzzle, and check back daily for more hints.

When Is The Next Strands Game After #816?

All New York Times games are updated daily at 12 am or Midnight in your respective time zone. Information about the next game is often available in the hours leading up to it, giving players a heads-up. The game on May 29 will be Strands Game #817.

What Is Strands?

Strands is a daily word search puzzle game created by The New York Times. Launched in 2024, Strands challenges players to discover a common theme among words in a 6×8 letter grid. The game’s original concept was developed by Juliette Seive, a research director on The New York Times Games team, with the aim of replicating Wordle’s success. Tracy Bennett has served as the puzzle editor for Strands, overseeing the creation and curation of daily puzzles since the publication’s launch.

For even more Insider Gaming delivered straight to your inbox, sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/nyt-strands-816-hints-and-answers-for-today-may-28-2026/

item.title: Destruction AllStars Pulled from PlayStation Store
item.content:encoded:
Another PlayStation exclusive has been pulled from the PlayStation Store. An email recently confirmed that Destruction AllStars, a 2021 release, has been pulled from the online store. Additionally, the game’s live-service features will remain offline, including online multiplayer.

Developed by Lucid Games and published by Sony, this was a vehicle combat game that was exclusive to PlayStation platforms. The game was originally planned to be a launch title for PS5 in November 2020, but was pushed back to April 2021.

Destruction AllStars Single-Player Mode Stays Until November

The only part of the game that is sticking around, at least until November, is the single-player mode. He confirmed that the single-player mode will stick around until November 25. Beyond that, solo arcade modes will stick around but with limited functionality.

“Due to ongoing technical issues, multiplayer services for Destruction AllStars on PlayStation 5 consoles shall remain offline and are no longer available,” reads the statement (via Press Start).

Unfortunately, many live service games have been shut down this year. Highguard lasted less than 2 months before being shut down. Amazon Games’ New World: Aeternum is slated to be taken offline next year. Concord, another Sony exclusive, was shut down after a very short life cycle in 2024. The game reportedly cost over $400 million to make. Learn more about that here.

Insider Gaming will continue to monitor the story and report any updates if new information becomes available.

How do you feel about this shutdown of yet another PlayStation exclusive? Sound off about this story and all others in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Remedy CEO Says AI Can’t Replicate Games Like Alan Wake 2
item.content:encoded:
The new Remedy CEO offers comments on AI and his specific viewpoint on why it won’t make game development cheaper anytime soon.

Jean-Charles Gaudechon, a former EA executive, was recently announced as the new CEO of Remedy. Taking on the role at the head of the CONTROL developer, he’s now talking about one of the most discussed topics in all of gaming, the use of AI and how it will power the future.

Remedy CEO Says AI Won’t Make Game Development Cheaper Soon

During an interview with Christopher Dring of The Game Business, Jean-Charles Gaudechon was asked whether he believes automated technology will help game development. He emphasized the importance of human creativity in Remedy’s releases and explained why he doesn’t believe AI will make game development cheaper for the foreseeable future.

“My stance is that AI is not going to make things cheaper, and it’s not going to make things cheaper for a pretty long time. People thinking, ‘Oh, we can now make games cheaper with this’, I have big question marks around that. And what types of games by the way? I said this during the earnings call, good luck trying to do Alan Wake 2 with AI. Try to use Genie and do that, and we’ll see where you land.

“But we’ve always been an R&D studio. It’s always dabbling with tech stuff. So, I’m not going to block people from doing so. But we’re going to be extremely cautious on that, never getting anywhere close to creative and anywhere close to user-facing.”

AI has been widely discussed in gaming recently. PlayStation went so far as to say that they believe AI will be powering the future of their games. They are also working closely with Bandai Namco on generative AI technology. Learn more about that here.

Sound off about this story and all others in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/remedy-ceo-says-ai-cant-replicate-games-like-alan-wake-2/

item.title: Donkey Kong 64 Finally Joins Nintendo Switch Online
item.content:encoded:
Donkey Kong 64 is now available on Nintendo Switch Online as part of the Nintendo 64 classics. Nintendo announced that the game will join the service on June 4, just in time to celebrate the one-year anniversary of the Switch 2’s release.

Until the release of Donkey Kong Bananza in 2025, Donkey Kong 64 was the only 3D adventure featuring Donkey Kong. While the wild character is set to return to the three-dimensional world, fan-favorites like Lanky Kong and Chunky Kong have yet to make a comeback in any games.

What’s Next for Nintendo?

With the month of June upon us and several gaming showcases announced, everyone is still waiting for the announcement of the first general Nintendo Direct presentation of the year. It is known that Star Fox is returning in a remake of Star Fox 64 on the Nintendo 64 with enhanced visuals and more. Much like Donkey Kong, Fox McCloud is seeing a resurgence spurred by an appearance in a Super Mario Bros movie.

As for other potential announcements from Nintendo, everyone is still expecting the announcement of The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake. Reliable, weaker NateTheHate previously claimed that the game would be released later this year. The next Fire Emblem installment still needs a release date, and players are hoping for an announcement on either the next 3D Mario experience or a Super Smash Bros. title. For more on what could be coming at a Nintendo Direct, click here.

Insider Gaming will continue to monitor the story and report any updates as more information becomes available. Sound off about this story and all others in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Looking at the early ratings, Mina the Hollower has proven itself as a contender for the indie GOTY award in 2026.

The Witcher 3 Songs of the Past DLC Brings Updated PC System Requirements

The Witcher 3 will get a new set of minimum PC system requirements due to the Songs of the Past expansion.

No Man’s Sky The Swarm Update Details Revealed

No Man’s Sky players will be facing off against The Swarm in the month of May thanks to a new update. Here are more details.

item.title: Pokémon Game Sales Surpass 515 Million Worldwide
item.content:encoded:
The Pokémon Company confirms Pokémon game sales have surpassed 515 million units, including 26 million sold last year. In its latest financial earnings report, The Pokémon Company revealed that by the end of the fiscal year ending in 2016, it had sold up to 515 million video games.

At the end of March 2025, that number was 489 million. This means that 26 million Pokémon games were sold in the last fiscal year. It’s known that at least 4 million of those sales are from Pokémon Pokopia.

Pokémon Remains One of Gaming’s Best-Selling Franchises Ever

In the financial earnings report, it was noted that over 85 billion Pokémon trading cards have been produced for the Pokémon franchise. Regarding the consistency of the video games, the Pokémon Company stated that the core Pokémon experience has remained unchanged and continues to engage new generations of players.

“Ever since the launch of the “Pokémon Red” and “Pokémon Green” versions in 1996, the basic aspects of “Pokémon” video games remain unchanged: players collect Pokémon, engage them in battles, raise them to progressively higher levels, and trade them with others.”

The next mainline Pokémon games are scheduled to release in 2027. Pokémon Winds and Waves is out next year. However, there’s no release date at this time. While there is no release date, there is a potential price leak from Amazon. Learn more about that at this link.

Speaking of Pokopia, the European region will soon begin selling Nintendo Switch 2 bundles that include the game. Learn more about that here.

What do you want to see for the future of Pokémon? Sound off about this story and all others in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

item.title: Former Rockstar Developers Haven’t Matched GTA’s Success, Says CEO
item.content:encoded:
Take-Two CEO Strauss Zelnick comments on the gap between GTA releases and discusses why other developers haven’t been able to match Rockstar Games’ success.

Rockstar Games plans on finally releasing Grand Theft Auto 6 in November of this year, 13 years after the release of GTA 5. It’s not as though GTA 5 has struggled in any way, however. The game continues to sell 5 million games per quarter, and GTA Online continues to get quality-of-life updates that have secured its longevity as well. Now, Zelnick is discussing what “scares” Take-Two and what he believes will ultimately lead to another property rising up to truly combat GTA.

Take-Two CEO Says Creativity, Not Tech, Will Challenge GTA

During the TD Cowen 54th Annual Technology, Media & Telecom conference call, Zelnick Press stated that many have tried to create a massive hit the size of GTA or any of the major properties in Take-Two’s portfolio; however, they haven’t found success. He even alluded to former Rockstar employees unsuccessfully trying to match that success.

“Lots of other people have tried. Lots and lots, including former Rockstar employees. So far, they haven’t been able to do it. Doesn’t mean they can’t in the future, by the way. We’re always running scared. But it won’t be technology that changes the game. That won’t be the change. What’ll change is that some extraordinarily creative individual or individuals will show up and do something astonishing. Our goal is to get those people to work within the Take-Two system. If we fail to do that, we fail,” he said.

MindsEye is a single-player cinematic action game developed by Build A Rocket Boy, a studio founded by former Rockstar North President Leslie Benzies.

For anyone worried, Zelnick has confirmed the release date of GTA 6 at least three times in the last month. Learn more here.

Sound off about this story and all others in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.
